series_metadata.series_description: Includes information about gonorrhea and related miscellaneous organisms specimen results. Also includes name of the patient, provider, city, and the tests results. Also includes specimen results for- warded to the centers for disease control for verifi

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain in office for six months, then transfer to the State Records Center. Maintain at the State Records Center for 1.5 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred
